markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content strategy, SEO, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/rGewGxkcW_peMdszqSfLXhs8FzDTPLe6?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Strategy:** Adopt a dual strategy: short (800–1.5k words) for product news, long (3k+) for top-of-funnel SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/rGewGxkcW_peMdszqSfLXhs8FzDTPLe6?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [**New Content Type:** Produce a competitor comparison article to address internal requests and capture high-intent search traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/rGewGxkcW_peMdszqSfLXhs8FzDTPLe6?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
  - [**SEO Pivot:** Shift from high-difficulty keywords (e.g., "Agentic Commerce News," KD 60) to lower-difficulty, marketer-focused terms (e.g., "Agentic Commerce for Marketers").](https://fathom.video/share/rGewGxkcW_peMdszqSfLXhs8FzDTPLe6?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [**Process:** The calibration article's feedback will train GrowthX's AI pipeline, ensuring future content aligns with Talon.One's voice and style.](https://fathom.video/share/rGewGxkcW_peMdszqSfLXhs8FzDTPLe6?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Word Count

  - [**Problem:** Internal feedback questioned the length of the first calibration article (3k+ words).](https://fathom.video/share/rGewGxkcW_peMdszqSfLXhs8FzDTPLe6?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [**Decision:** Adopt a dual strategy to match content length to its purpose.](https://fathom.video/share/rGewGxkcW_peMdszqSfLXhs8FzDTPLe6?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
      - [**Short Form (800–1.5k words):** For product launches, integration announcements, and other news.](https://fathom.video/share/rGewGxkcW_peMdszqSfLXhs8FzDTPLe6?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
      - [**Long Form (3k+ words):** For top-of-funnel SEO articles requiring in-depth coverage.](https://fathom.video/share/rGewGxkcW_peMdszqSfLXhs8FzDTPLe6?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### SEO Strategy & Keyword Focus

  - [**Problem:** Initial keyword targets (e.g., "Agentic Commerce News," KD 60) are too difficult for Talon.One's domain authority (DA 36).](https://fathom.video/share/rGewGxkcW_peMdszqSfLXhs8FzDTPLe6?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [**Solution:** Pivot to lower-difficulty, marketer-focused terms.](https://fathom.video/share/rGewGxkcW_peMdszqSfLXhs8FzDTPLe6?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [**Example:** "What is agentic commerce for marketers?"](https://fathom.video/share/rGewGxkcW_peMdszqSfLXhs8FzDTPLe6?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This targets users in the consideration phase who are actively seeking implementation guidance.](https://fathom.video/share/rGewGxkcW_peMdszqSfLXhs8FzDTPLe6?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [**Opportunity:** The term "Agentic Commerce loyalty program" is new and underserved, presenting a chance for early authority.](https://fathom.video/share/rGewGxkcW_peMdszqSfLXhs8FzDTPLe6?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)

### Competitor Comparison Articles

  - [**Rationale:** To address internal requests and capture high-intent search traffic from users in the consideration phase.](https://fathom.video/share/rGewGxkcW_peMdszqSfLXhs8FzDTPLe6?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
  - [**Execution:**](https://fathom.video/share/rGewGxkcW_peMdszqSfLXhs8FzDTPLe6?tab=summary&timestamp=1195.0)
      - [**Tone:** Factual and neutral, not negative.](https://fathom.video/share/rGewGxkcW_peMdszqSfLXhs8FzDTPLe6?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
      - [**Focus:** Emphasize Talon.One's strengths and features.](https://fathom.video/share/rGewGxkcW_peMdszqSfLXhs8FzDTPLe6?tab=summary&timestamp=1364.0)
      - [**Assets:** Embed videos to increase engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/rGewGxkcW_peMdszqSfLXhs8FzDTPLe6?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)
      - [**Data Source:** Use Talon.One's existing battle cards for accuracy, with product marketing oversight.](https://fathom.video/share/rGewGxkcW_peMdszqSfLXhs8FzDTPLe6?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)

### Project Status & Next Steps

  - [**Calibration Article:** Awaiting Rachel Lynch's review before final feedback is sent to GrowthX's managing editor.](https://fathom.video/share/rGewGxkcW_peMdszqSfLXhs8FzDTPLe6?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
  - [**Blog Cover Images:** Due by Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/rGewGxkcW_peMdszqSfLXhs8FzDTPLe6?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
  - [**Content Ramp-Up:** Begins next week.](https://fathom.video/share/rGewGxkcW_peMdszqSfLXhs8FzDTPLe6?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**Looker Dashboard:** Will be built next week to track performance once content is published.](https://fathom.video/share/rGewGxkcW_peMdszqSfLXhs8FzDTPLe6?tab=summary&timestamp=1584.0)

      - [Review existing "Agentic Commerce" blogs and suggest optimization tweaks.](https://fathom.video/share/rGewGxkcW_peMdszqSfLXhs8FzDTPLe6?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)
      - [Draft one competitor comparison article for review in the next 1–2 weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/rGewGxkcW_peMdszqSfLXhs8FzDTPLe6?tab=summary&timestamp=1468.0)
